Part.Source:
////Se &opcao = 0 transferir a sigla em codigo do IBGE ////Se &opcao <> 0 transferir o codigo do IBGE em sigla
If &opcao = 0 Do Case Case &Sigla = "RO" &cUF = "11" Case &Sigla = "AC" &cUF = "12" Case &Sigla = "AM" &cUF = "13" Case &Sigla = "RR" &cUF = "14" Case &Sigla = "PA" &cUF = "15" Case &Sigla = "AP" &cUF = "16" Case &Sigla = "TO" &cUF = "17" Case &Sigla = "MA" &cUF = "21" Case &Sigla = "PI" &cUF = "22" Case &Sigla = "CE" &cUF = "23" Case &Sigla = "RN" &cUF = "24" Case &Sigla = "PB" &cUF = "25" Case &Sigla = "PE" &cUF = "26" Case &Sigla = "AL" &cUF = "27" Case &Sigla = "SE" &cUF = "28" Case &Sigla = "BA" &cUF = "29" Case &Sigla = "MG" &cUF = "31" Case &Sigla = "ES" &cUF = "32" Case &Sigla = "RJ" &cUF = "33" Case &Sigla = "SP" &cUF = "35" Case &Sigla = "PR" &cUF = "41" Case &Sigla = "SC" &cUF = "42" Case &Sigla = "RS" &cUF = "43" Case &Sigla = "MS" &cUF = "50" Case &Sigla = "MT" &cUF = "51" Case &Sigla = "GO" &cUF = "52" Case &Sigla = "DF" &cUF = "53" Case &Sigla = "EX" &cUF = "EX" EndCase Else Do Case Case &Sigla = "11" &cUF = "RO" Case &Sigla = "12" &cUF = "AC" Case &Sigla = "13" &cUF = "AM" Case &Sigla = "14" &cUF = "RR" Case &Sigla = "15" &cUF = "PA" Case &Sigla = "16" &cUF = "AP" Case &Sigla = "17" &cUF = "TO" Case &Sigla = "21" &cUF = "MA" Case &Sigla = "22" &cUF = "PI" Case &Sigla = "23" &cUF = "CE" Case &Sigla = "24" &cUF = "RN" Case &Sigla = "25" &cUF = "PB" Case &Sigla = "26" &cUF = "PE" Case &Sigla = "27" &cUF = "AL" Case &Sigla = "28" &cUF = "SE" Case &Sigla = "29" &cUF = "BA" Case &Sigla = "31" &cUF = "MG" Case &Sigla = "32" &cUF = "ES" Case &Sigla = "33" &cUF = "RJ" Case &Sigla = "35" &cUF = "SP" Case &Sigla = "41" &cUF = "PR" Case &Sigla = "42" &cUF = "SC" Case &Sigla = "43" &cUF = "RS" Case &Sigla = "50" &cUF = "MS" Case &Sigla = "51" &cUF = "MT" Case &Sigla = "52" &cUF = "GO" Case &Sigla = "53" &cUF = "DF" Case &Sigla = "EX" &cUF = "EX" EndCase EndIf
